headline: EXPEDIA GROUP INC (NASDAQ:EXPE): A Decent Value Stock With Strong Growth and Profitability
summary: EXPEDIA GROUP INC (EXPE) offers compelling value at a P/E of 15.44 versus a 34.48 industry average. With strong profitability and growth, this "Decent Value" stock balances low valuation with financial health and upside potential.
